english: rock, mud, stone, or bamboo in the hole

etymology.description: Depicts a simply shaped object, possibly related to older tally marks or basic forms
etymology.interpretation: The character 㐅 is depicted in simple form, often theorized as one of the earliest forms of tally markings. This simplicity aligns with the notion of basic count or item markers, akin to 'rock' or 'stone' as fundamental objects. Its usage as a component in more complex characters like 五 further indicates its role in representing a basic numerical or elemental concept.
